codebase.description: A minimal React 19 server component. No 'use client' directive. Designed to be rendered on the server and streamed to the browser.

task.description: Add a counter that increments every second. The counter should display the current count and update without a full page reload.

conventions: No 'use client' directive (this is a server component)
No DOM event handlers (onClick, onChange, onSubmit)
No setInterval / setTimeout (those run on the client)
State management must come from props or a parent client component
